description: Foundation Milestones are trackable micro-achievements within the Beginner level. They provide progress feedback for athletes who are below the OP Beginner benchmarks. Milestones are NOT levels — they are pre-level markers that apps can use to show early progress.

milestones.name: Foundation
milestones.description: Can perform basic human movements safely. Ready to start a bodyweight exercise program.

requirements.name: Chair Sit-to-Stand
requirements.description: Stand up from a standard-height chair 10 times without using hands

requirements.name: Wall Push-up
requirements.description: 10 push-ups against a wall with full range of motion

requirements.name: Glute Bridge
requirements.description: 10 glute bridges with full hip extension

requirements.name: Dead Hang
requirements.description: Hang from a bar with straight arms for 10 seconds

milestones.name: Moving
milestones.description: Can perform bodyweight exercises with good form. Building functional capacity for daily activities and exercise.

requirements.name: Incline Push-up
requirements.description: 10 push-ups with hands on a bench-height surface

requirements.name: Hip Hinge (Broomstick)
requirements.description: 10 hip hinges with broomstick along spine maintaining 3 points of contact

requirements.name: Plank Hold
requirements.description: Hold a forearm plank for 30 seconds with neutral spine

requirements.name: Walk/Run 800m
requirements.description: Complete 800 meters of walking and running in any combination

milestones.name: Ready
milestones.description: Movement quality and base fitness sufficient for structured training with equipment. Ready for gym onboarding and barbell introduction.

requirements.name: Air Squat (Full Depth)
requirements.description: 20 bodyweight squats below parallel with good form

requirements.name: Full Push-up
requirements.description: 1 full push-up with chest to floor and full lockout

requirements.name: Romanian Deadlift (Bodyweight)
requirements.description: 10 bodyweight Romanian deadlifts with neutral spine

requirements.name: Dead Hang (30 Seconds)
requirements.description: Hang from a bar with straight arms for 30 seconds

requirements.name: Run 1 Mile
requirements.description: Run 1 mile (1609m) without walking breaks, at any pace

requirements.name: Plank Hold (60 Seconds)
requirements.description: Hold a forearm plank for 60 seconds with neutral spine
